title: Disgraza Craft
description: A modpack focused entirely on exploration and creativity. Version 1.20.1 with good optimization.
body:
**_Disgraza Craft_** is a Modpack slightly optimized for version 1.20.1, it has optimization mods like "**Embeddium**" and some others. It was created so that those with modest and not so powerful computers can run it without many problems and without many bottlenecks.

The main focus is exploration and construction, but it also has elements of magic, dungeons, etc. If you just like to build, feel free and use whatever your creativity allows.
![Taiga view](https://64.media.tumblr.com/77bcbfec23a0cee7dee1d949a92f162e/55a8ca5f546e09f3-94/s1280x1920/e69d5af384671bc5afa51aa94b9dc129a61a04fd.pnj)
_Download if you are good enough to play_. **Recommend 6GB of RAM**.
